title: Landing page: Pricing/Purchase plans + Stock Specialists sections with header navigation

requirements.summary: Add a Pricing/Purchase section on the landing page with three plan cards (exact names/prices) using shadcn-style Cards and non-payment CTAs.
acceptanceCriteria: A new section exists in frontend/src/pages/ContentPage.tsx with a stable anchor id (e.g., id="pricing") and contains exactly three plan cards.

Each plan card displays the exact plan name and price text as provided (including “k” and spacing/semicolons as shown, unless normalized for consistent typography while preserving the numbers and plan names).
Each plan card includes a CTA button that performs a non-payment action (e.g., scrolls to #contact or pre-fills a message), and no checkout/payment integration is added.
The section is responsive (single column on mobile, multi-column on desktop) and matches the site’s existing visual theme.

file_operations.description: Implement a new <section id="pricing"> on the landing page that renders exactly three plan cards with the user-provided text: “Foundation plan ; 75k”, “Growth plan ; 125k”, and “Loss recovery Specialist ;175k”. Use the shadcn-ui Card and Button components to match existing styling (Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing). Ensure responsive layout (e.g., single column on mobile, multi-column on desktop). Add a clear CTA button on each plan that performs a non-payment action only (e.g., scroll to #contact and optionally prefill the Contact message field with the selected plan), and do not add any payment/checkout integration.

requirements.summary: Add a Stock Specialists section on the landing page with structured, English, non-promissory specialist-focused content consistent with existing disclaimer positioning.
acceptanceCriteria: A new section exists in frontend/src/pages/ContentPage.tsx with a stable anchor id (e.g., id="specialists").
The section includes specialist-focused content presented as cards or structured bullet points consistent with current UI components and styling.
No text in the new section guarantees returns or contradicts the existing disclaimer language.

file_operations.description: Add a new <section id="specialists"> to the landing page containing English stock-specialist-related content (capabilities, areas of expertise, and what users can expect) presented in Cards and/or structured bullet lists consistent with the current design. Use shadcn-ui Card primitives for visual consistency (Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing). Ensure the content does not guarantee returns and remains aligned with the existing educational/disclaimer language.

requirements.summary: Update header navigation to link to the new Pricing/Purchase and Stock Specialists sections while preserving existing Home/About/Contact behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx nav includes anchors to the new section ids (e.g., #pricing and #specialists).
Clicking the new nav links scrolls to the correct sections on the page.
Existing nav links still work as before.

file_operations.description: Update the header <nav> to add links for the new sections (e.g., anchors to #pricing and #specialists) while keeping existing Home (#home), About (#about), and Contact (#contact) links intact and functional.
Add/adjust global styling to improve anchor navigation UX (e.g., enable smooth scrolling and/or scroll offset behavior if needed) without changing the existing theme variables or disclaimer content.
